title: Ecliptic (disambiguation)
content:
'''Ecliptic''' could refer to:

==Canon==
*The '''''[[Rand Ecliptic]]''''', an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] warship

==Legends==
*The '''''[[Ecliptic (warship)|Ecliptic]]'''''; a ship under the control of [[Saul Karath]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]].
*The '''[[Ecliptic (Consular-class)|''Ecliptic'']]''', a [[Consular-class cruiser|''Consular''-class space cruiser]] in the [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Forces]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
*The '''[[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|''Rand Ecliptic'']]''', an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] warship.
*The '''[[Ecliptic Evaders]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]]

==See also==
*[[Wikipedia:Ecliptic|Ecliptic]], an astronomical term used in [[Astrogation/Legends|astrogation]] and, by extension, [[Space warfare/Legends|space warfare]].
{{Disambig}}
